name: Bitlife
description: BitLife is a life simulation game where you can live a virtual life from birth to death. Make choices that shape your character’s destiny, from education and career paths to relationships and adventures. Experience the ups and downs of life, explore different lifestyles, and even make some unconventional decisions! Whether you aim for wealth, fame, or happiness, each playthrough is unique. Will you become a successful entrepreneur, a beloved celebrity, or something entirely different? The possibilities are endless!
creator: tariq johnson
